CA1510.fullDescription: Throw helpers are simpler and more efficient than an if block constructing a new exception instance.

CS0105.shortDescription: Using directive appeared previously in this namespace

CS0657.shortDescription: Not a valid attribute location for this declaration

CS8618.shortDescription: Non-nullable field must contain a non-null value when exiting constructor. Consider adding the 'required' modifier or declaring as nullable.

SA1028.shortDescription: Code should not contain trailing whitespace
SA1028.fullDescription: There should not be any whitespace at the end of a line of code.

SA1114.fullDescription: The start of the parameter list for a method/constructor/indexer/array/operator call or declaration does not begin on the same line as the opening bracket, or on the line after the opening bracket.

SA1115.fullDescription: A parameter within a C# method or indexer call or declaration does not begin on the same line as the previous parameter, or on the next line.

SA1121.fullDescription: The code uses one of the basic C# types, but does not use the built-in alias for the type.

SA1200.shortDescription: Using directives should be placed correctly
SA1200.fullDescription: A C# using directive is placed outside of a namespace element.

SA1201.shortDescription: Elements should appear in the correct order
SA1201.fullDescription: An element within a C# code file is out of order in relation to the other elements in the code.

SA1208.shortDescription: System using directives should be placed before other using directives
SA1208.fullDescription: A using directive which declares a member of the 'System' namespace appears after a using directive which declares a member of a different namespace, within a C# code file.

SA1210.shortDescription: Using directives should be ordered alphabetically by namespace
SA1210.fullDescription: The using directives within a C# code file are not sorted alphabetically by namespace.

SA1413.shortDescription: Use trailing comma in multi-line initializers
SA1413.fullDescription: A multi-line initializer in a C# code file should use a comma on the last line.

SA1503.fullDescription: The opening and closing braces for a C# statement have been omitted.

SA1508.shortDescription: Closing braces should not be preceded by blank line
SA1508.fullDescription: A closing brace within a C# element, statement, or expression is preceded by a blank line.

SA1512.shortDescription: Single-line comments should not be followed by blank line
SA1512.fullDescription: A single-line comment within C# code is followed by a blank line.

SA1513.shortDescription: Closing brace should be followed by blank line
SA1513.fullDescription: A closing brace within a C# element, statement, or expression is not followed by a blank line.

SA1515.shortDescription: Single-line comment should be preceded by blank line
SA1515.fullDescription: A single-line comment within C# code is not preceded by a blank line.

SA1516.shortDescription: Elements should be separated by blank line
SA1516.fullDescription: Adjacent C# elements are not separated by a blank line.

SA1518.shortDescription: Use line endings correctly at end of file
SA1518.fullDescription: File is required to end with a single newline character

SA1601.fullDescription: A C# partial element is missing a documentation header.

SA1602.fullDescription: An item within a C# enumeration is missing an Xml documentation header.

SA1611.fullDescription: A C# method, constructor, delegate or indexer element is missing documentation for one or more of its parameters.

SA1614.shortDescription: Element parameter documentation should have text
SA1614.fullDescription: A <param> tag within a C# element's documentation header is empty.

SA1615.shortDescription: Element return value should be documented
SA1615.fullDescription: A C# element is missing documentation for its return value.

SA1616.shortDescription: Element return value documentation should have text
SA1616.fullDescription: The <returns> tag within a C# element's documentation header is empty.

SA1629.shortDescription: Documentation text should end with a period
SA1629.fullDescription: A section of the XML header documentation for a C# element does not end with a period.

SA1649.shortDescription: File name should match first type name
SA1649.fullDescription: The file name of a C# code file does not match the first type declared in the file.
